title: Goniophlebium tomentellum
taxonomy: Goniophlebium tomentellum belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody fern family. This species is a type of fern, specifically a member of the genus Goniophlebium, which consists of small to medium-sized terrestrial ferns. Goniophlebium tomentellum is native to tropical regions and is often found in shaded areas with high humidity. The classification of Goniophlebium tomentellum also places it within the subclass Polypodiidae and the class Polypodiopsida. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally agreed to be a member of the Polypodiaceae family.
